# `polars math sign` for [dataframe](/commands/categories/dataframe.md)

<div class='command-title'>Compute the element-wise sign of a column expression, returning -1, 0, or 1.</div>

## Signature

```> polars math sign {flags} ```


## Input/output types:

| input             | output            |
| ----------------- | ----------------- |
| polars_expression | polars_expression |
| polars_selector   | polars_expression |
## Examples

Compute the element-wise sign of an integer column
```nu
> [[a]; [0] [-1] [2] [-3] [4]] | polars into-df | polars select (polars col a | polars math sign) | polars collect
╭───┬────╮
│ # │ a  │
├───┼────┤
│ 0 │  0 │
│ 1 │ -1 │
│ 2 │  1 │
│ 3 │ -1 │
│ 4 │  1 │
╰───┴────╯

```
